non_citizen_exemptions.reason: live agent session handle; reconstruct via agent-runner/ModelRequest, server/Address, and topology/Package descriptors
live agent fabric handle; reconstruct via topology/Package and agent-runner/ModelCard descriptors
live agent loopback stream handle; reconstruct via server/Frame and stream/Packet descriptors
agent component runtime shell; reconstruct from topology/Package and agent-runner/ModelCard descriptors
live cookbook store handle; reconstruct from embedded recipe descriptors
live MCP sampling host bridge; requests and responses use mcp/Request and mcp/Response descriptors
gateway request runtime shell; class-backed descriptor is openai/GatewayRequest
gateway response runtime shell; class-backed descriptor is openai/GatewayResponse
gateway run runtime shell; class-backed descriptor is openai/GatewayRun
gateway event runtime shell; class-backed descriptor is openai/GatewayEvent
runtime response wrapper; serializable projection is openai/GatewayResponse descriptor
live OpenAI gateway fabric handle; reconstruct route data via openai/GatewayRequest and openai/Plan descriptors
gateway key object stores redacted credential policy; serializable projection is openai/GatewayKey descriptor
live OpenAI gateway route table handle; route requests use openai/GatewayRequest descriptor
OpenAI table storage wrapper; class-backed descriptor is the wrapped openai/* value
live server connection handle; reconstruct via server/Address descriptor and connect ops
live coroutine handle; inspect through server/Frame descriptor and coroutine ops
server frame runtime shell; class-backed descriptor is server/Frame
live server handle; reconstruct configuration via server/Address descriptor and start ops
live trigger handle; reconstruct source through server/Address descriptor and trigger ops
shape-bearing runtime skill card; serializable projection is skill/Card descriptor
live skill registry handle; cards use skill/Card descriptor
live skill transport handle; transport metadata is carried by skill/Card descriptor

packages.rustdoc_summary: SIM's server library: a loadable lib that serves eval and agents over a transport. It exposes sites (local, coroutine, pipeline, loop, fabric), frame routing, REPL drivers, connections, and transports so callers can request evaluation, stream replies, and run agent loops across the runtime.
